title: The MLP: Per-Token Expansion and the GELU Gate

cues.label: Per-token worker
cues.headline: The MLP works on one token row at a time
cues.narration: The section starts by separating attention from the MLP. Attention lets rows talk. The MLP does private feature work inside each row.

cues.label: Context-aware row
cues.headline: The row is no longer context-free after attention
cues.narration: The MLP only sees one row, but that row may already contain cross-token context written by attention.

cues.label: Expand, GELU, compress
cues.headline: A linear layer expands, GELU gates, and another linear layer compresses
cues.narration: The audio walks through the shape. A d_model row expands into a wider hidden space, passes through GELU, then compresses back to d_model.

cues.label: Why expand
cues.headline: Expansion creates room for intermediate feature combinations
cues.narration: The wider space acts like a workbench. It gives the MLP more temporary coordinates where candidate signals can appear.

cues.label: GELU dimmer
cues.headline: GELU is a smooth gate, not a hard switch
cues.narration: The audio explains GELU as a dimmer. Strong positive features pass, weak features contribute a little, and negative features fade.

cues.label: Feature sharpening
cues.headline: The MLP can sharpen useful internal evidence
cues.narration: In the toy phrase, context about cat and sat can make location-like continuations more plausible later. The MLP changes internal evidence, not the next token directly.

cues.label: Output head reads
cues.headline: The output head later reads the changed hidden features
cues.narration: The MLP does not emit vocabulary probabilities. It changes features that the output head can later map to logits.

cues.label: Gate internals
cues.headline: GELU decides which intermediate signals survive
cues.narration: The section goes deeper into the gate. The visual shows expanded features being damped or preserved before compression.

cues.label: Stored associations
cues.headline: MLP weights can express associations without acting like a database
cues.narration: The audio corrects the phrase 'facts live in the MLP.' The MLP applies learned transformations when the current row activates them.

cues.label: Not token chooser
cues.headline: The MLP changes the representation, not the final token
cues.narration: The common shortcut is too crisp. Attention writes context, the MLP performs nonlinear row work, and the output head scores later.

cues.label: MLP residual
cues.headline: The MLP output is added back as a residual update
cues.narration: The residual add matters after the MLP because the row before the MLP still carries token identity and attention context.

cues.label: Visual expectation
cues.headline: A good MLP visual shows expansion, gating, compression, and add
cues.narration: The audio says a box labeled MLP is not enough. The visual now shows the real movement through the temporary wide layer and back.

cues.label: MLP summary
cues.headline: The MLP is nonlinear per-row feature work in the residual stream
cues.narration: The section ends by tying the pieces together: attention provides context, the MLP transforms each row, and the residual stream carries the update forward.
